# Sentinel Governance Pull Request Template

## Description
<!-- Briefly describe the policy change or integrity check modification. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Policy Update (New requirement)
- [ ] Integrity Check Improvement (Script fix)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure/Workflow change

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] I have verified this change locally using `governance_check.ps1`.
- [ ] I have updated the configuration in `governance.config.yaml` if needed.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce hardcoded secrets.

## Context
<!-- Link to any relevant issues or NDR ecosystem notes. -->
